query: I need help with a client deliverable but I'm not sure whether this should end up as a PDF, slide deck, workbook, or Word document.
why: The request is explicitly ambiguous inside the document family and should enter the using-documents router first.

query: Fill this PDF form and render the completed pages to images so I can verify placement.
why: This is clearly in the document family and should route through using-documents to the PDF child.

query: Turn this landing-page copy into a one-page PDF brochure for investor emails and a Word version for edits.
why: Browser-style source language should not hide that the user still needs document artifacts, so the family router should load.

query: Build a marketing landing page for a fintech startup with a pricing section and contact form.
why: This is a website-building request, not a document-format request.
